RAID LOG — Healthcare Integration, Clinic A Pilot
Prepared by: M. Okafor (PC) | Initial draft 2026-02-10 (kickoff)

RISKS
R1 | Vendor integration complexity
    Description: Multiple endpoints to integrate with vendor API; potential for
                 unexpected behavior at boundaries.
    Impact: Medium
    Owner: J. Patel (Lead Eng)
    Mitigation: Investigating vendor documentation; will schedule architecture
               review with vendor SE team.

R2 | Scope ambiguity for clinic A pilot
    Description: Pilot success criteria not fully defined at kickoff.
    Impact: Medium
    Owner: K. Bell (PO)
    Mitigation: Finalize criteria with steering before build start.

R3 | Resource availability
    Description: Project team capacity uncertain over Q2.
    Impact: Medium
    Owner: L. Davies (Eng Manager)
    Mitigation: Assess team capacity; escalate to leadership if gaps emerge.

R4 | HL7 integration unknown complexity
    Description: HL7 feeds may need additional adapter work.
    Impact: Low-Medium
    Owner: D. Huang (Eng)
    Mitigation: Investigate during design phase.

ISSUES
I1 | Awaiting vendor SOW finalization
    Owner: K. Bell
    Action: Follow up with vendor account exec.

ASSUMPTIONS
A1 | Vendor will deliver v1 endpoints on time per kickoff timeline.
    Owner: J. Patel.

A2 | Clinic A staff training plan will be ready by build complete.
    Owner: T. Njoku.

DEPENDENCIES
D1 | Vendor API access
    Owner: C. Morales (Vendor SM)
    Note: Awaiting access credentials.

D2 | Internal IT for environment provisioning
    Owner: R. Silva
    Note: Tickets submitted.

(End of log. No subsequent updates.)
